SEARCH
Package com.monkey.mcbot.api.model

Record Class BotSkin

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.monkey.mcbot.api.model.BotSkin
Record Components:
source - skin resolution source
playerReference - player name/UUID reference (for BotSkinSource.PLAYER_REFERENCE)
textureValue - Mojang texture value payload (for BotSkinSource.TEXTURE_VALUE)
textureSignature - optional Mojang texture signature for signed payloads
textureUrl - texture URL (for BotSkinSource.TEXTURE_URL)
public record BotSkin(BotSkinSource source, String playerReference, String textureValue, String textureSignature, String textureUrl) extends Record
Skin/profile configuration for API-spawned bots.

  • Constructor Details

    • BotSkin

      public BotSkin(BotSkinSource source, String playerReference, String textureValue, String textureSignature, String textureUrl)
      Canonical constructor with source-specific normalization and validation.

      Unused fields are nulled according to the selected source. Required fields are validated and may throw IllegalArgumentException.

  • Method Details

    • random

      public static BotSkin random()
      Creates a random skin configuration.
      Returns:
      random skin config

    • owner

      public static BotSkin owner()
      Creates a skin configuration that uses the primary owner skin.
      Returns:
      owner skin config

    • firstTeamOwner

      public static BotSkin firstTeamOwner()
      Creates a TEAM_ALLY skin configuration that uses the first online team owner.
      Returns:
      first-team-owner skin config

    • player

      public static BotSkin player(String playerReference)
      Creates a skin configuration resolved from an online player reference.
      Parameters:
      playerReference - player name or UUID string
      Returns:
      player-reference skin config

    • texture

      public static BotSkin texture(String textureValue)
      Creates a skin configuration from an unsigned texture payload.
      Parameters:
      textureValue - texture value payload
      Returns:
      texture-value skin config

    • texture

      public static BotSkin texture(String textureValue, String textureSignature)
      Creates a skin configuration from a signed texture payload.
      Parameters:
      textureValue - texture value payload
      textureSignature - texture signature payload
      Returns:
      texture-value skin config

    • url

      public static BotSkin url(String textureUrl)
      Creates a skin configuration from a texture URL.
      Parameters:
      textureUrl - texture URL with http or https scheme
      Returns:
      texture-url skin config

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

      Returns the value of the source record component.
